faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in West Farms typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. faqs.question: How quickly can you treat bed bugs in West Farms apartments?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout West Farms. Most treatments can be scheduled within 24-48 hours of your call. Heat treatments are completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families in West Farms homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families, children, and pets. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our targeted chemical applications use low-toxicity formulations that are safe once dry, typically within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a 60-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in West Farms. If bed bugs return within this period, we will re-treat your home at no additional charge. We also provide detailed prevention guidance to help ensure long-term protection for your Bronx residence.
